claims: WPHX PHP emits the original-path wp-includes/class-wp-http-cookie.php public class adapter for WP_Http_Cookie.
The WPHX-312.53 candidate no longer copies and patches a public PHP class shell for promoted cookie matching/header behavior.
The public constructor body is now a manifest-recorded compiler adapter template instead of an inline Haxe PhpRawBlock string.

PHP still owns constructor parsing/defaults, parse_url, strtotime, urldecode, dynamic Set-Cookie attributes, public properties, #[AllowDynamicProperties], and wp_http_cookie_value filter timing while Haxe owns bounded post-construction matching, header formatting, and attribute shape.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http_Cookie constructor ownership, Requests cookie jar semantics, or live HTTP behavior.
This does not claim installed WordPress distribution behavior or selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit parity for WP_Http_Cookie.
This does not claim broader HTTP cookie propagation ownership or that WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
